title: Better Wood Crafting
description: Better wood crafting recipies with less wood loss (trapdoors, doors etc...
body:
# Real Carpentry
## Smarter wood crafting with the Stonecutter:
Tired of wasting planks on tiny wooden parts?
Real Carpentry lets you craft wood blocks like trapdoors, fences, and slabs directly in the Stonecutter – faster, cleaner, and with less waste.
## Features:
Adds all basic wood recipes to the Stonecutter (trapdoors, slabs, fences, etc.)

Recipes are more efficient than in the crafting table
→ Example: 1 plank = 6 trapdoors instead of 6 planks for 2 trapdoors

Works with all wood types!

## Short:
No new blocks. No setup. Just better carpentry.

## The Changes:

✅ Trapdoors
Vanilla: 6 planks → 2 trapdoors

RC: 1 plank → 6 trapdoors

✅ Slabs
Vanilla: 3 planks → 6 slabs

RC: 1 plank → 2 slabs

✅ Stairs
Vanilla: 6 planks → 4 stairs

RC: 1 plank → 1 stairs

✅ Fences
Vanilla: 4 planks + 2 sticks → 3 fences

RC: 1 plank → 2 fences

✅ Fence Gates
Vanilla: 4 planks + 2 sticks → 1 gate

RC: 1 plank → 2 gates

✅ Doors
Vanilla: 6 planks → 3 doors

RC: 1 plank → 1 doors

✅ Buttons
Vanilla: 1 plank → 1 button

RC: 1 plank → 6 button

✅ Pressure Plates
Vanilla: 2 planks → 1 plate

RC: 1 plank → 6 plate

✅ Signs
Vanilla: 6 planks + 1 stick → 3 signs

RC: 1 plank → 3 signs

---
